Off Calendar Jul-18-2012 Continued To Aug-01-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney and the Executor to appear on August 1, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the receipt for the blocked account has not been filed. Status on filing of the receipt for the blocked account was continued to August 1, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.
